entries.title: Control Plane Example Validation Hardening Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the initial direction decision for Control Plane Example Validation Hardening.

entries.title: Core Python Workspace Root Decision
entries.summary: Records the decision to use core/python as the single Python workspace root alongside the versioned control plane.

entries.title: Data Contract Example Operationalization Alignment Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the initial direction decision for Data Contract Example Operationalization Alignment.

entries.title: Derived Projection Status Semantics Alignment Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the decision to use explicit artifact_status naming for derived initiative and coordination projection entries.

entries.title: Design Document Index Relationship Alignment Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the accepted direction for Design Document Index Relationship Alignment.

entries.title: Documentation Family Lookup and README Template Alignment Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the initial direction decision for Documentation Family Lookup and README Template Alignment.

entries.title: End-to-End Repository Rationalization Direction
entries.summary: Records the decision to keep the current planning-family model and coordination start-here path while focusing the final pre-implementation follow-up on trust-surface guardrails, external pack validation, and CLI modularity.

entries.title: Foundation Scope and EntryPoint Realignment Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the decision to publish an explicit repository-scope foundation, keep future product narrative clearly secondary for current repo ownership questions, and preserve a thin-root entrypoint model.

entries.title: Governed Front Matter Directory Canonicalization Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the initial direction decision for Governed Front Matter Directory Canonicalization.

entries.title: Internal Project Code Review and Hardening Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the decision to repair lifecycle stale-state bugs with conditional scaffold coordination refresh and explicit planning-catalog closeout refresh.

entries.title: Internal Project Code Review Follow-up Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the accepted direction to harden bootstrap decision scaffolds, require the same decision-semantic rule in aggregate validation, and keep bootstrap-only traces in implementation_planning until real execution work exists.

entries.title: Internal Project Review and Hardening Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the decision to keep repository validation strict, harden planning bootstrap to produce a complete baseline, and consolidate coordination payload shaping behind shared serializers.

entries.title: Internal Project Standards Review and Hardening Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the accepted direction for Internal Project Standards Review and Hardening.

entries.title: Machine-First Coordination Entry Surface Decision
entries.summary: Records the decision to add one derived coordination index above the family-specific planning indexes and use it as the default machine start-here surface.

entries.title: Planning Authority Unification Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the decision to add a canonical planning catalog and machine authority map while keeping current family views as projections or compatibility surfaces.

entries.title: Planning Semantics and Decision Contract Alignment Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the accepted direction for converging decision-record authoring rules and shared Markdown semantics enforcement.

entries.title: Machine Coordination Entrypoint Decision
entries.summary: Records the decision to keep the current authored planning families and strengthen the initiative index as the primary machine coordination entrypoint for traced work.

entries.title: Reference and Workflow Standards Alignment Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the accepted direction for converging reference authoring rules and workflow additional-load enforcement.

entries.title: Reference Resolution Reuse Hardening Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the initial direction decision for Reference Resolution Reuse Hardening.

entries.title: Repo-Local Hotspot Modularity Hardening Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the direction decision to close the remaining report-validated repo-local hotspot modularity issue through bounded helper extraction instead of a broader redesign.

entries.title: Route Preview Natural Request Matching Direction
entries.summary: Record the bounded direction for fixing natural maintenance-request route preview matching without introducing semantic routing.

entries.title: Standard Authoring Surface Alignment Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the accepted direction for Standard Authoring Surface Alignment.

entries.title: Standard Operationalization Directory Canonicalization Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the initial direction decision for Standard Operationalization Directory Canonicalization.

entries.title: Standard, Runtime, and Route Explicitness Hardening Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the initial direction decision for Standard, Runtime, and Route Explicitness Hardening.

entries.title: Standards Lookup and Generic Template Alignment Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the accepted direction for descendant-aware standards lookup and generic-template scope alignment.

entries.title: Task Sync Disappearing File Resilience Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the initial direction decision for Task Sync Disappearing File Resilience.

entries.title: Workflow Operationalization Direction
entries.summary: Records the decision to keep workflow documents authoritative while adding machine-readable route and metadata artifacts plus bounded authoring commands.

entries.title: Workflow Routing Review Accuracy Alignment Direction Decision
entries.summary: Records the initial direction decision for Workflow Routing Review Accuracy Alignment.
